examples.patch:

         .rstn_i(rstn_i),

+        .flush_i(flush_int.flush_if),
         .load_i(!control_int.stall_if),
         .input_i(stage_if_id_d),
         .output_o(stage_if_id_q)

         .clk_i(clk_i),
         .rstn_i(rstn_i),

         .clk_i(clk_i),
         .rstn_i(rstn_i),

-        .kill_i(control_int.flush_exe),
